source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: cinematic hero, video-first immersive landing page, premium AI product page, portfolio landing page, design agency homepage, launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

Visual traits:
- film-title-frame hero composition
- full-bleed atmospheric video or large poster media
- explicit dark overlays and gradient fades
- large centered headline
- floating navbar above media
- CTA row that remains readable over video

Use when:
- cinematic hero
- video-first immersive landing page
- premium AI product page
- portfolio landing page
- design agency homepage
- launch page

Avoid when:
- ordinary form or table workflow
- video without readable overlay
- bright video behind white text
- cropped product content
- video stealing attention from CTA
- heavy full-screen video blur

AI summary: Cinematic video hero pattern for premium landing pages: full-bleed or poster video, explicit z-index layers, gradient readability overlays, floating navbar, large centered headline, CTA row, HLS/MP4 fallbacks, and reduced-motion/static poster fallback. Use it for AI products, portfolios, design agencies, and launch pages.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: cinematic hero, video-first immersive landing page, premium AI product page, portfolio landing page, design agency homepage, launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Use video z-0, overlay z-0 or z-5, content z-10 or z-20, navbar z-50.
- Atmospheric background video should use object-cover; product/light transparent video should use w-full h-auto and avoid cropping.
- Overlay text requires a dim layer or gradient fade.
- Bottom fade height should be about 160px to 300px depending on contrast.
- Use large centered headline and short subheadline; do not let video compete with CTA.
- Avoid generic split hero unless the media is immersive and specifically supports the story.

AI summary: Cinematic video hero pattern for premium landing pages: full-bleed or poster video, explicit z-index layers, gradient readability overlays, floating navbar, large centered headline, CTA row, HLS/MP4 fallbacks, and reduced-motion/static poster fallback. Use it for AI products, portfolios, design agencies, and launch pages.

content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: cinematic hero, video-first immersive landing page, premium AI product page, portfolio landing page, design agency homepage, launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Keep text readable over bright video with overlays.
- Avoid rapid camera movement behind reading content.
- Provide reduced-motion or static poster fallback.
- Do not rely on video content to communicate the only value proposition.
- Do not crop important product/video content by accident.

AI summary: Cinematic video hero pattern for premium landing pages: full-bleed or poster video, explicit z-index layers, gradient readability overlays, floating navbar, large centered headline, CTA row, HLS/MP4 fallbacks, and reduced-motion/static poster fallback. Use it for AI products, portfolios, design agencies, and launch pages.

source_name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
content:
# User distilled premium web UI prompt set - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: cinematic hero, video-first immersive landing page, premium AI product page, portfolio landing page, design agency homepage, launch page
Evidence: summary_only / high
Source: local-generated:2026-04-28/premium-web-ui-prompts

- Video attributes: autoPlay, muted, loop or custom loop, playsInline, preload='auto'.
- Use hls.js for .m3u8 when needed, native HLS where possible, and MP4 fallback when provided.
- For hard cuts, fade in over 0.5s, fade out 0.5s before end, set opacity 0 on ended, wait 100ms, reset currentTime to 0, play, then fade back to 1.
- Common overlays: bg-black/20, bg-gradient-to-t from-black to-transparent, bg-gradient-to-b from-black via-transparent to-black.
- Avoid heavy CSS blur on full-screen video; use overlays and composition instead.

AI summary: Cinematic video hero pattern for premium landing pages: full-bleed or poster video, explicit z-index layers, gradient readability overlays, floating navbar, large centered headline, CTA row, HLS/MP4 fallbacks, and reduced-motion/static poster fallback. Use it for AI products, portfolios, design agencies, and launch pages.
